text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During a regularly scheduled physical
evaluation...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ahh... I knew it! It's just as I thought!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well, it's about my weight, you see...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It hasn't gone up at all, despite indulging in
sweets!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And despite the fact I no longer train as
excessively as I used to!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure it's because I've been getting the proper
nutrients from the meal plan you made for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to express my gratitude once again for
your painstaking guidance, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen and I renew our determination
to continue working hard together.
